mapper.select: SELECT * FROM stage_drop_statistics_task_log WHERE time_granularity = #{timeGranularity} AND start_time >= #{start} AND end_time <= #{end} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stage_drop_statistics_task_log (id, time_granularity, data_count, create_time, start_time, end_time) VALUES ( #{log.id}, #{log.timeGranularity}, #{log.dataCount}, #{log.createTime}, #{log.startTime}, #{log.endTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE stage_drop_statistics_task_log SET time_granularity = #{log.timeGranularity}, data_count = #{log.dataCount}, create_time = #{log.createTime}, start_time = #{log.startTime}, end_time = #{log.endTime} WHERE id = #{log.id}
